title: West Burton Solar Project: Correction of errors, Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State to make corrections to the West Burton Solar Project Order 2025.  Date of decision  3 June 2025  Company/location   West Burton Solar Project LimitedFulhamLondon   Type of project  Development consent order for photovoltaic solar farm / Correction of errors, Planning Act 2008. "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
